details.test: Task 1: Subscribe to cheapest HD plan and start new account
Task 2: Add family movie under 2 hours to watchlist
Task 3: Create kids profile and enable PIN for non-kids profiles
Task 4: Start recent sci-fi series and queue next two episodes
Task 5: Build 'Weekend Binge' list with three titles from different genres
Task 6: Set Spanish subtitles and original audio as default playback settings
Task 7: Switch to cheapest eligible plan under $20
Task 8: Schedule reminders for crime episodes on Friday, Saturday, Sunday
Task 9: Rate viewing history and add recommendations to watchlist
